---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for XPAC
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to a frustration?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the use case who would benefit from this feature.

## Mockups / Screenshots

If applicable, add mockups or screenshots to illustrate the feature.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the feature request here.
